nasb.text: for I was afraid of you, because you are an exacting man; you take up what you did not lay down and reap what you did not sow.’

esv.text: for I was afraid of you, because you are a severe man. You take what you did not deposit, and reap what you did not sow.’

cnv.text: 因為我怕你，你一向是嚴厲的人，沒有存的要提取，沒有種的要收割。’

ccb.text: 因为你很严厉，没有存还要取，没有种还要收，所以我怕你。’

csbs.text: 我怕你，因为你是个严厉的人，不是你存放的，你提取；不是你播种的，你收获。’
